Petition For Order Directing Payment From Mary A. Pini Trust To Estate Of August J. Pini
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Barbara DeVries (Trustee). Edward Otonello for and with Linda Harrington (Former Trustee).

Mr. Otonello stated that he had no problem with repayment of the $6,000.00 to the Trust but that his Client felt that she should not be charged the $500.00 amount for half of the cleaning cost. Mr. Siricusa stated that he was not going to argue over the $500.00. Mr. Otonello will provide statements for the utilities. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to payment of income to August Pini and invasion of principle. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Directing Payment From Mary A. Pini Trust To Estate Of August J. Pini

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Linda Harrington (Conservator of Lifetime Benificiary August Pini). Lawrence Siracusa for and with Barbara DeVries.

After hearing oral argument from all parties, the court ruled as follows: 1)The upstairs unit is to remain vacant. 2)The request for the reserve is denied. 3)Any distribution as to principal is at the discretion of the Trustee. 4)Any invasion of Mary's principal is upto the discretion of the Trustee. In addition, the Court stated that the trust did not speak as to Mr. Pini's principle. Mr. Siracusa is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Letora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.

Petition For Appt. Of Successor Trustee And Instructions Relating To Trustee'S Management Of Trust Property
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Molly Jacobson appearing for and with trustee John Lauricella. Dennis Vann appearing for Linda Harrington as conservator for the beneficiary. Doug Penson appearing for and with Barbar DeVries. With no objection to resignation of trustee and appointment of Barbara DeVries as successor trustee with $300,000.00 bond, request is granted. On petition for instructions to rent the vacant unit, issue is reserved until the incoming trustee petition for instructions. The vacant unit ought to remain vacant until further order of Court. Mr. Lauricella's additional fee request has to be on a notice petition. Order signed as modified. General Plan must be filed two weeks before 10/8/07. First Account must be filed two weeks before 7/15/08. Mr. Lauricella's final account must be filed two weeks before 7/16/07.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.
